message:
fix: connect tabbed interface View method to actual rendering

The View() method was still returning placeholder text instead of calling
the actual renderTabbedView() implementation.

Changed:
  return "Tabbed Config Placeholder"

To:
  return m.renderTabbedView()

This fixes the issue where users only saw placeholder text instead of
the complete tabbed interface with tab headers, content, and buttons.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
